debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

failed_attempts:
intro y
  by_contra hg
  push_neg at hg
  let S := Set.range (abs ∘ f)
  have hS_bdd : BddAbove S := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have hS_nonempty : S.Nonempty := ⟨|f 0|, 0, rfl⟩
  let M := sSup S
  have hM_le : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M := fun x ↦ le_csSup hS_bdd (Set.mem_range_self x)
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (abs_pos.mpr hx) (hM_le x)
  have : M ≤ M / |g y| := by
    apply csSup_le hS_nonempty
    rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩
    rw [le_div_iff₀ (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg)]
    have : 2 * |f x| * |g y| ≤ 2 * M := calc
      2 * |f x| * |g y| = |2 * f x * g y| := by
        rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (by norm_num)]; ring
      _ = |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| := by rw [h₀]
      _ ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := abs_add _ _
      _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add (hM_le _) (hM_le _)
      _ = 2 * M := by ring
    linarith
  rw [div_le_iff₀ (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg)] at this
  nth_rw 2 [← mul_one M] at this
  exact not_le_of_lt hg ((mul_le_mul_left hM_pos).mp this)
